description: Google Cloud Core provides shared foundational types and utilities used by Google Cloud Java client libraries, including service options, retry helpers, paging, IAM policy models, timestamps, and testing support. It supplies common abstractions for credentials, transport configuration, service RPC factories, and base service behavior so individual Google Cloud clients can share consistent runtime infrastructure.

Google Cloud Core provides shared abstractions and base types used by Google Cloud Java client libraries. It includes service options, retry helpers, paging, IAM policy, resource metadata, and other common infrastructure for building and using Google Cloud service clients.
